# FastSoyAdmin

> Full-stack admin template: FastAPI (Python) + Vue3 (TypeScript), with RBAC, Redis caching, Docker deployment.

- Source: https://github.com/sleep1223/fast-soy-admin
- Preview: https://fast-soy-admin.sleep0.de/
- Docs: https://sleep1223.github.io/fast-soy-admin-docs/
- API Docs: https://apifox.com/apidoc/shared-7cd78102-46eb-4701-88b1-3b49c006504b
- License: MIT
- Upstream: https://github.com/soybeanjs/soybean-admin (frontend)

## Documentation

Full docs: [llms-full.md](llms-full.md)

### Guide (Frontend)
- [Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/intro.md): Project overview, tech stack, architecture
- [Quick Start](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/quick-start.md): Environment setup, Docker and local development
- [Router Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/intro.md): Elegant Router, RouteMeta
- [Route Structure](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/structure.md): Single, secondary, multi-level, parameter routes
- [Route Creation](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/create.md): How to create new routes
- [Dynamic Route](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/dynamic.md): Static vs dynamic route modes, RBAC
- [Route Cache](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/cache.md): keep-alive caching
- [Route Component](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/component.md): Layout, view, mixed components
- [Router Push](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/push.md): useRouterPush hook
- [Router Guard](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/router/guard.md): Auth flow, guards
- [Request Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/request/intro.md): Environment config, request functions
- [Request Usage](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/request/usage.md): API definitions, fetchXxx pattern
- [Proxy](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/request/proxy.md): Dev and production proxy
- [Connect Backend](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/request/backend.md): Token handling, error codes
- [Theme Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/theme/intro.md): Theme system overview
- [Theme Config](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/theme/config.md): Theme settings
- [UnoCSS Theme](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/theme/unocss.md): Atomic CSS integration
- [Icon Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/icon/intro.md): Iconify + local SVG
- [Icon Usage](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/icon/usage.md): Static, dynamic, render function
- [useTable](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/guide/hooks/use-table.md): Table data management hook

### Backend
- [Introduction](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/intro.md): Tech stack, directory structure, startup flow
- [Architecture](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/architecture.md): Layered architecture, RBAC model, middleware
- [Models](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/models.md): User, Role, Menu, Api, Button ORM models
- [API Routes](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/api.md): Auth, system-manage, route endpoints
- [Auth & RBAC](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/auth.md): JWT, AuthControl, PermissionControl
- [CRUD Base](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/crud.md): Generic CRUD, controllers, response wrappers
- [Response Codes](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/codes.md): 0000-9999 code definitions
- [Configuration](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/config.md): .env settings, code quality config
- [Deployment](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/backend/deployment.md): Docker Compose, manual deploy, Nginx

### Standards
- [Overview](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/standard/index.md): Code standards overview
- [Naming](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/standard/naming.md): Frontend and backend naming conventions
- [Vue Style](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/standard/vue.md): SFC script order, template rules
- [Backend Style](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/standard/backend.md): Python code style, Ruff, Pyright

### Other
- [FAQ](fastsoy-admin-docs/src/faq/index.md): Common issues and solutions

## Tech Stack

Backend: Python 3.12+, FastAPI, Pydantic v2, Tortoise ORM 1.x, Redis, Argon2, JWT (HS256)
Frontend: Vue 3.5, Vite 7, TypeScript 5, Naive UI, Pinia, UnoCSS, Alova, Elegant Router, vue-i18n
DevOps: Docker Compose (Nginx + FastAPI + Redis), uv, pnpm monorepo, Ruff, Pyright, ESLint, oxlint

## Architecture

Monorepo: backend at root (/app), frontend in /web (pnpm workspaces).

Backend layered: Router -> Controller -> CRUD/Model
Frontend layered: Views -> Service/Store -> API Client

RBAC: Users <-> Roles <-> (Menus, APIs, Buttons), all many-to-many.
Super admin role R_SUPER bypasses permission checks.
Standard response: {"code": "0000", "msg": "OK", "data": {...}}
JWT auth: access token (12h) + refresh token (7d), HS256.

## Quick Start

### Docker (recommended)
git clone https://github.com/sleep1223/fast-soy-admin && cd fast-soy-admin
docker compose up -d
# Nginx :1880, FastAPI :9999, Redis :6379

### Local Development
# Backend
uv sync && uv run python run.py        # port 9999

# Frontend
cd web && pnpm install && pnpm dev      # port 9527

## Project Structure

/app/                    # Backend (FastAPI)
  api/v1/                # Routers: auth, route, system_manage
  controllers/           # Business logic: user, role, menu, api
  models/system/         # Tortoise ORM models
  schemas/               # Pydantic request/response schemas
  core/                  # Init, auth, CRUD base, middleware, context
  settings/              # Pydantic Settings (.env)
  utils/                 # Security (argon2, JWT), tools

/web/src/                # Frontend (Vue3)
  views/                 # Page components
  service-alova/         # HTTP client + API endpoints
  store/modules/         # Pinia: auth, route, tab, theme, app
  router/                # Elegant Router + guards
  layouts/               # Base layout + blank layout
  components/            # Reusable components
  locales/               # i18n (zh-CN, en-US)
  hooks/                 # Vue composables
  typings/               # TypeScript declarations

/fastsoy-admin-docs/     # VitePress documentation site
/deploy/                 # Docker configs (Dockerfile, nginx)
/migrations/             # Tortoise ORM DB migrations
